summary_en: ¥200M upper limit; 200,000 shares (2.28% of shares outstanding); open-market purchase on TSE; Jun 1 – Nov 30, 2026. Shares subject to 2:1 split effective Jul 1, 2026, after which authorization rises to ¥200M for 400,000 shares.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Articles of Incorporation Pursuant to Article 459, Paragraph 1 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Kyodo Public Relations resolved by board decision to acquire up to 200,000 shares of its own common stock, representing 2.28% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock), for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥200 million. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the period from June 1 to November 30, 2026. The company cited the need for flexible capital policy responsive to the business environment as the rationale. Notably, the company is simultaneously conducting a 1:2 stock split effective July 1, 2026, designed to enhance liquidity and broaden the investor base. Following the split, the authorization will be reframed as 400,000 shares at the ¥200 million ceiling. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 78,970 treasury shares against 8,736,022 shares outstanding (excluding treasury).
